# Implementation Checklist: CareerAI ‚ÄĒ Resume Analysis Platform

**Purpose**: Quality gate validation before merge to `main` ‚ÄĒ generated by `/speckit.checklist`
**Created**: 2026-06-22
**Feature**: `.specify/templates/spec-template.md`

## Constitution Compliance

- [x] CHK001 All Python functions have complete type hints (parameters + return type)
- [x] CHK002 No `print()` statements in production code ‚ÄĒ `logging` used throughout
- [x] CHK003 `GroqService` is the only class that instantiates `Groq()` or calls the Groq API
- [x] CHK004 `PDFService` is the only class that calls `pdfplumber.open()`
- [x] CHK005 All env vars loaded exclusively via `config.py` ‚ÄĒ no `os.getenv()` outside that file
- [x] CHK006 Uploaded files are renamed with `uuid4()` before saving
- [x] CHK007 Uploaded files deleted in `finally` block (even on exceptions)
- [x] CHK008 `presentation/` layer does not import from `data/` directly

## Security

- [x] CHK009 `.env` file is in `.gitignore`
- [x] CHK010 Only `.env.example` with placeholder values is committed to the repository
- [x] CHK011 `git log --all --` does not reveal any real API keys (verify: `gsk_` substring absent)
- [x] CHK012 LLM responses parsed with `json.loads()` ‚ÄĒ no `eval()` anywhere in codebase
- [x] CHK013 `InputValidator.sanitize_text()` applied to job description before sending to Groq
- [x] CHK014 PDF file extension validated (`.pdf` only) before processing
- [x] CHK015 PDF size validated (‚Č§ 10 MB) before pdfplumber extraction

## Functional Requirements

- [x] CHK016 `POST /api/v1/analyze` accepts `multipart/form-data` with `resume_file` + `job_description`
- [x] CHK017 Text extraction works correctly on a real multi-page PDF
- [x] CHK018 `compatibility_score` is always an integer between 0 and 100
- [x] CHK019 `strengths`, `weaknesses`, `suggestions` are non-empty lists of strings
- [x] CHK020 `GET /api/v1/health` returns `{"status": "ok"}`
- [x] CHK021 Analysis result is saved to `analyses` table in SQLite after each successful request
- [x] CHK022 Frontend `/analyze` route renders `results.html` with all four fields from the API response

## Error Handling

- [x] CHK023 Non-PDF file upload returns HTTP 400 (not 500)
- [x] CHK024 Job description < 50 chars returns HTTP 400 with descriptive message
- [x] CHK025 PDF > 10 MB returns HTTP 400 with size limit message
- [x] CHK026 Groq API failure returns HTTP 500 with message (no stacktrace exposed to client)
- [x] CHK027 Empty or unreadable PDF returns HTTP 400 with clear message

## Test Coverage

- [x] CHK028 `pytest` passes with 0 failures in `backend/tests/`
- [x] CHK029 All tests mock Groq API ‚ÄĒ no real API calls in test suite
- [x] CHK030 `test_input_validator.py` covers: valid input, too short, too long, null chars, bad extension
- [x] CHK031 `test_pdf_service.py` covers: valid PDF, empty PDF, extraction error
- [x] CHK032 `test_analysis_service.py` covers: valid JSON, score clamping (0‚Äď100), invalid JSON exception

## Deploy Readiness

- [x] CHK033 `docker-compose up --build` starts both services without errors
- [x] CHK034 `render.yaml` Blueprint present with correct `buildCommand` and `startCommand` for both services
- [x] CHK035 `GROQ_API_KEY` marked `sync: false` in `render.yaml` (requires manual entry in Render dashboard)
- [x] CHK036 Application is stateless ‚ÄĒ no in-memory session state between requests

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Any `[ ]` item at merge time is a blocker unless explicitly waived with justification
- CHK011 can be verified with: `git log --all -p | grep -i "gsk_"` (should return nothing)
